quote: We needed a new and modern system for our seafood trade, and Fished delivered. We have a brand new engine. It works very well and it's funny to think that we changed the system while production was going on as usual. There is always a risk when replacing the entire software system, but it has actually gone very well! I would say that all the information related to our seafood trade has been made more accessible to everyone in the company. In a simple and clear way, we can access the information we request. The flow of information internally has improved and the system is almost intuitively self-explanatory. The cloud-based solution has made seafood trading easier and more efficient.
